requirements.fulltext: Autopilot shall always satisfy altitude_hold => absReal(altitude - altitude_IC) <= 35.0

semantics.description:
SCOPE: in the interval defined by the entire execution.
TRIGGER: first point in the interval.
REQUIRED BEHAVIOR: for every trigger, (altitude_hold => absReal ( altitude - altitude_IC ) <= 35.0) must hold at all time points between (and including) the trigger and the end of the interval.
semantics.probabilistic_description:
SCOPE: in the interval defined by the entire execution.
TRIGGER: first point in the interval.
REQUIRED BEHAVIOR: for every trigger, with probability >=1, (altitude_hold => absReal ( altitude - altitude_IC ) <= 35.0) must hold at all time points between (and including) the trigger and the end of the interval.

requirements.fulltext: while (autopilot_engaged & !hdg) Autopilot shall always satisfy (roll_angle - roll_cmd - rollAtZero)/(roll_cmd - rollAtZero) <= 0.1

semantics.description:
SCOPE: in the interval defined by the entire execution.
TRIGGER: first point in the interval.
REQUIRED BEHAVIOR: for every trigger, (absReal ( roll_rate ) <= 6.6) must hold at all time points between (and including) the trigger and the end of the interval.
